subcodes.first_line: O My handmaidens! Upon you be My glory and My mercy! The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that ye are indeed men, nay rather [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امائی علیکن بهائی و رحمتی قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد بر اینکه شما رجالید بلکه از
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @role and station of women
